name: O-12 scaffolds behavior: scaffold.sh on real run copies the kind into target
command: rm -rf /tmp/o12-real; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/scaffold.sh" --kind react-spa --target /tmp/o12-real 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -s /tmp/o12-real/package.json ] && echo created 1>&2; rm -rf /tmp/o12-real
